agents.name: Orchestrator
agents.instructions:
1. :cmd{"id":"custom","input":"{"instructions":"Your job is to manage a prior authorization workflow end to end. You will retrieve a queue of patient authorization IDs, then for each one: download the authorization document, extract the relevant data, and use that data to fill out and submit a prior authorization form.\nFollow these steps exactly:\nStep 1 — Get the Auth ID queue Call the Browser Sort Order Agent :chip{\"id\":\"cc0c9044-58d5-452a-b25a-a4699501bc64\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}. It will return an array of Auth IDs.\nStep 2 — Process two Auth IDs at a time Using Download File Agent :chip{\"id\":\"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}and and their respective Read Agents :chip{\"id\":\"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}so that two Auth IDs can be processed concurrently. For every Auth ID in the array, run the following sequence in order:\n- 2a. Download and extract the document Pass the Auth ID to the Download File Agent :chip{\"id\":\"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}. It will download the patient's authorization document and internally delegate to the Read Agent :chip{\"id\":\"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"} to extract all structured data needed for the form. It will return that extracted data to you.\n- 2b. Fill and submit the form Carry the output from Download File Agent :chip{\"id\":\"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"} and pass it as the input of Fill Form Agent :chip{\"id\":\"ef506927-5ca9-4ffa-abea-eaae39173ec7\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}. Each Fill Form Agent will populate every required field in the prior authorization form and submit it."}","preview":"Your job is to manage a prior authorization workflow end to end. You will retrieve a queue of patient authorization IDs, then for each one: download the authorization document, extract the relevant data, and use that data to fill out and submit a prior authorization form.
Follow these steps exactly:
Step 1 — Get the Auth ID queue Call the Browser Sort Order Agent :chip{"id":"cc0c9044-58d5-452a-b25a-a4699501bc64","groupId":"agent"}. It will return an array of Auth IDs.
Step 2 — Process two Auth IDs at a time Using Download File Agent :chip{"id":"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536","groupId":"agent"}and and their respective Read Agents :chip{"id":"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a","groupId":"agent"}so that two Auth IDs can be processed concurrently. For every Auth ID in the array, run the following sequence in order:
- 2a. Download and extract the document Pass the Auth ID to the Download File Agent :chip{"id":"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536","groupId":"agent"}. It will download the patient's authorization document and internally delegate to the Read Agent :chip{"id":"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a","groupId":"agent"} to extract all structured data needed for the form. It will return that extracted data to you.
- 2b. Fill and submit the form Carry the output from Download File Agent :chip{"id":"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536","groupId":"agent"} and pass it as the input of Fill Form Agent :chip{"id":"ef506927-5ca9-4ffa-abea-eaae39173ec7","groupId":"agent"}. Each Fill Form Agent will populate every required field in the prior authorization form and submit it."}
2. :cmd{"id":"callSpecializedAgent","input":"{"agent":":chip{\"id\":\"cc0c9044-58d5-452a-b25a-a4699501bc64\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}"}","preview":"Use the **callSpecializedAgent** tool to call the :chip{"id":"cc0c9044-58d5-452a-b25a-a4699501bc64","groupId":"agent"} agent"}
3. :cmd{"id":"queueAgents","input":"{"agent":":chip{\"id\":\"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}","inputs":{"authID":"auth id of the user"},"waitUponQueueing":false}","preview":"Use the **queueAgents** tool to queue the :chip{"id":"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536","groupId":"agent"} agent with:
- waitUponQueueing: false
- authID: auth id of the user
"}
4. :cmd{"id":"queueAgents","input":"{"agent":":chip{\"id\":\"ef506927-5ca9-4ffa-abea-eaae39173ec7\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}","inputs":{"gender":"Patient Gender","drugname":"Drug name","lastname":"Patients last name","quantity":"Quantity (including time period)","Npinumber":"Prescriber NPI Number","firstname":"Patient first name  ","datofbirth":"Patient Date of birth (yyyymmdd)","phonenumber":"Patient Phone number","drugstrength":"Drug Strength (with unit)","prescriberName":"Prescriber's full name ","routeOfAdministration":"Route of Administration"},"waitUponQueueing":false}","preview":"Use the **queueAgents** tool to queue the :chip{"id":"ef506927-5ca9-4ffa-abea-eaae39173ec7","groupId":"agent"} agent with:
- waitUponQueueing: false
- gender: Patient Gender
- drugname: Drug name
- lastname: Patients last name
- quantity: Quantity (including time period)
- Npinumber: Prescriber NPI Number
- firstname: Patient first name  
- datofbirth: Patient Date of birth (yyyymmdd)
- phonenumber: Patient Phone number
- drugstrength: Drug Strength (with unit)
- prescriberName: Prescriber's full name 
- routeOfAdministration: Route of Administration
"}

input.instructions:
Your job is to manage a prior authorization workflow end to end. You will retrieve a queue of patient authorization IDs, then for each one: download the authorization document, extract the relevant data, and use that data to fill out and submit a prior authorization form.
Follow these steps exactly:
Step 1 — Get the Auth ID queue Call the Browser Sort Order Agent :chip{"id":"cc0c9044-58d5-452a-b25a-a4699501bc64","groupId":"agent"}. It will return an array of Auth IDs.
Step 2 — Process two Auth IDs at a time Using Download File Agent :chip{"id":"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536","groupId":"agent"}and and their respective Read Agents :chip{"id":"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a","groupId":"agent"}so that two Auth IDs can be processed concurrently. For every Auth ID in the array, run the following sequence in order:
- 2a. Download and extract the document Pass the Auth ID to the Download File Agent :chip{"id":"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536","groupId":"agent"}. It will download the patient's authorization document and internally delegate to the Read Agent :chip{"id":"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a","groupId":"agent"} to extract all structured data needed for the form. It will return that extracted data to you.
- 2b. Fill and submit the form Carry the output from Download File Agent :chip{"id":"a1bb2be6-4216-47d0-91e0-1b2597a66536","groupId":"agent"} and pass it as the input of Fill Form Agent :chip{"id":"ef506927-5ca9-4ffa-abea-eaae39173ec7","groupId":"agent"}. Each Fill Form Agent will populate every required field in the prior authorization form and submit it.

information.description:
Extract the following information:
Patient Information:

Patient First Name

Patient Last Name

Patient Date of Birth

Patient Phone Number

Patient Gender

Prescriber Information:





Prescriber Name



Prescriber NPI Number

Prescription Information:





Drug Name



Drug Strength (with unit



Route of Administration



Quantity (including time period)

agents.name: Fill form Agent

input.instructions: Fill up the prior authorization form with the instructions given and submit the form once you are done filling up every field

agents.name: Download file Agent
agents.instructions:
1. :cmd{"id":"downloadFile","input":"{"target":"Download button in the action column. Download the corresponding document for the auth ID {{authID}}","clickType":"LEFT"}","preview":"Use the **downloadFile** tool by LEFT clicking on the Download button in the action column. Download the corresponding document for the auth ID {{authID}}"}
2. :cmd{"id":"custom","input":"{"instructions":"After downloading the file read the document and extract the following information(use the file agent :chip{\"id\":\"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}):\n\nPatient Information:\n- Patient First Name\n- Patient Last Name\n- Patient Date of Birth\n- Patient Phone Number\n- Patient Gender\nPrescriber Information:\n- Prescriber Name\n- Prescriber NPI Number\nPrescription Information:\n- Drug Name\n- Drug Strength (with unit\n- Route of Administration\n- Quantity (including time period)\n\nThen return them as their various output values. "}","preview":"After downloading the file read the document and extract the following information(use the file agent :chip{"id":"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a","groupId":"agent"}):

Patient Information:
- Patient First Name
- Patient Last Name
- Patient Date of Birth
- Patient Phone Number
- Patient Gender
Prescriber Information:
- Prescriber Name
- Prescriber NPI Number
Prescription Information:
- Drug Name
- Drug Strength (with unit
- Route of Administration
- Quantity (including time period)

Then return them as their various output values. "}
3. :cmd{"id":"callSpecializedAgent","input":"{"agent":":chip{\"id\":\"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"}","inputs":{"information":"download file from step 1"}}","preview":"Use the **callSpecializedAgent** tool to call the :chip{"id":"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a","groupId":"agent"} agent with:
- information: download file from step 1
"}
4. :cmd{"id":"custom","input":"{"instructions":"Use the :chip{\"id\":\"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a\",\"groupId\":\"agent\"} output to complete the output data"}","preview":"Use the :chip{"id":"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a","groupId":"agent"} output to complete the output data"}

input.target: Download button in the action column. Download the corresponding document for the auth ID {{authID}}

input.instructions:
After downloading the file read the document and extract the following information(use the file agent :chip{"id":"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a","groupId":"agent"}):

Patient Information:
- Patient First Name
- Patient Last Name
- Patient Date of Birth
- Patient Phone Number
- Patient Gender
Prescriber Information:
- Prescriber Name
- Prescriber NPI Number
Prescription Information:
- Drug Name
- Drug Strength (with unit
- Route of Administration
- Quantity (including time period)

Then return them as their various output values.
Use the :chip{"id":"1c8c5bde-839b-44c3-8dfd-0c96926c9b6a","groupId":"agent"} output to complete the output data

agents.name: Browser sort order Agent
agents.instructions:
1. :cmd{"id":"custom","input":"{"instructions":"Extract all Auth IDs from the Web page and return them as an ordered list.\nSorting rules (apply in order):\n1. Priority: `high` before `standard`\n2. Within the same priority: earlier `date_submitted` first (ascending)\nOutput format:\nReturn only an array of strings, with no commentary, code fences, or extra keys.\nExample: [\"PA-2024-001\", \"PA-2025-001\"]\nEdge cases:\n- If `priority` is missing, treat it as `standard`\n- If `date_submitted` is missing or unparseable, place the record last within its priority group\n- If no Auth IDs are found, return `[]`\n- Preserve the exact formatting of Auth IDs as they appear in the source"}","preview":"Extract all Auth IDs from the Web page and return them as an ordered list.
Sorting rules (apply in order):
1. Priority: `high` before `standard`
2. Within the same priority: earlier `date_submitted` first (ascending)
Output format:
Return only an array of strings, with no commentary, code fences, or extra keys.
Example: ["PA-2024-001", "PA-2025-001"]
Edge cases:
- If `priority` is missing, treat it as `standard`
- If `date_submitted` is missing or unparseable, place the record last within its priority group
- If no Auth IDs are found, return `[]`
- Preserve the exact formatting of Auth IDs as they appear in the source"}

input.instructions:
Extract all Auth IDs from the Web page and return them as an ordered list.
Sorting rules (apply in order):
1. Priority: `high` before `standard`
2. Within the same priority: earlier `date_submitted` first (ascending)
Output format:
Return only an array of strings, with no commentary, code fences, or extra keys.
Example: ["PA-2024-001", "PA-2025-001"]
Edge cases:
- If `priority` is missing, treat it as `standard`
- If `date_submitted` is missing or unparseable, place the record last within its priority group
- If no Auth IDs are found, return `[]`
- Preserve the exact formatting of Auth IDs as they appear in the source

schema.description: The Auth ID for the document that needs to be downloaded
Prescription quantity (including time period e.g 30 tablets per 30 days)
prescription Drug strength with unit (eg. 10 mg)
Auth ID value handed over to the next agent in the workflow
